untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit implied volatility (IV) level monitoring and ATM option theoretical value tracking. Available indicators (hvol_20, india_vix) provide historical volatility proxies but not true implied volatility shifts or option Greeks (delta, vega, gamma). ATM dollar change and option-specific sensitivity cannot be directly modeled without access to options chain data and Greeks calculation.
translation_notes: Approximated volatility shift detection using hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) as a proxy for IV changes. Entry triggers on elevated volatility with volume confirmation. Exit on volatility mean reversion. This is a structural limitation—the signal fundamentally requires options-specific data (IV levels, option prices, Greeks) that are not available in the standard price/volume indicator set. A proper implementation would need access to options market data feeds.
